title: Using adverbs and adjectives
description: Identify when to use adverbs and when to use adjectives.

assessment_items.question_content:
What's best? An adverb or an adjective?

>The Scottish Highlands are remote, rainy, and \_\_\_\_\_\_. 

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Adjectives describe nouns: people, places, things, and ideas.

Adverbs describe parts of speech that are not nouns, typically verbs (action words) and adjectives.
We need a word that can be listed alongside the adjectives "remote" and "rainy" to describe the noun "Scottish Highlands".
We should use the *adjective* **"beautiful"**.
